meta.title: Busting the 15 BIGGEST military tech MYTHS
meta.description:
Some of the most pervasive myths about military technology are born out of the sheer complexity of modern warfare and the technologies employed within it. Others are based in the internet’s love for a sexy headline, even if it isn’t true. And a few of the most annoying ones just keep popping up over and over again because some people just really have trouble accepting the fact that World War II Germany wasn’t run by technologically advanced uber-mench. 

So, let’s run through 15 of these military tech myths, so we can be sure that none of us fall prey to them in the future.
